VAL-MEAL-002.notes: Both plan detail pages (Performance Fuel and Full Alignment Fuel) render correctly with all required elements: hero image with plan name and tagline, plan description section, what's included list (lunch, dinner, juice, snack, seasonal menu rotation), pricing section with subscription/one-time toggle and pricing cards, and 'Start Your Plan' CTA buttons. FAQ and Customer Reviews sections also present. No console errors detected.

VAL-MEAL-008.notes: Weekly menu page displays meals organized by day (Monday through Friday) with meal images, category labels (Breakfast Juice, Lunch, Dinner, Snack), meal names, and descriptions. Desktop view shows 4 meals per row. Mobile view (375px) correctly stacks meals in a single column with full-width images. CTA section at bottom ('Ready to Eat This Good?'). No console errors detected.

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. VAL-MEAL-002 confirmed both plan detail pages (Performance Fuel and Full Alignment Fuel) render hero images, descriptions, what's included lists, pricing with subscription/one-time toggle, and Start Your Plan CTAs. VAL-MEAL-008 confirmed weekly menu displays meals organized by day with images, names, and descriptions at both desktop and mobile widths.
